heroLead: Set a goal, track how your tabs and time line up, and get gentle nudges when you drift off track or dive too deep. Everything stays on your device.
featuresLead: Most tools catch only one. Why Am I Here? matches nudges to what actually went wrong.
featureDistractionBody: You meant to look up AWS pricing, but Reddit and email crept in. Get a gentle reminder when off-goal time and tabs pile up.
featureRabbitBody: You are on topic but forty tabs deep. A check-in asks if your goal is done so you can wrap up or keep going.
featureGoalBody: Set what you are looking for in the popup — never forced. The extension watches alignment in the background.
featureTimeBody: Separate counters for on-goal and off-goal minutes, only while your browser window is focused.
featureTabsBody: Counts on-goal vs off-goal tabs since your goal was set, using titles and URLs — no page body text.
featureLocalBody: No accounts, analytics, or remote servers. Your goal and session state never leave your device.
step1Body: Open the popup and type what you are looking for — e.g. "AWS pricing".
step2Body: A background worker tracks tab alignment and active time while your window is focused.
step3Body: When a nudge is ready, the icon shows "!". Open the popup to refocus, finish, or keep going — no OS notifications.
showcaseBody: Whether you hyperfocus into a rabbit hole or context-switch into distraction, the extension notices both patterns and nudges gently via the badge and popup.
privacyPoint1: Reads only open tab titles and URLs to match your goal
privacyPoint2: Never reads page body text or browsing history
privacyPoint4: Minimal permissions: tabs, storage, and alarms only
privacyCtaButton: Get Why Am I Here? free
